**Internal Deal Memo: Project Nebula**

Date: 1 November 2023

To: Acquisition Committee

Subject: Proposed Acquisition of Comet Technologies Pte. Ltd.

Dear Committee Members,

We are pleased to present the details of the proposed acquisition of Comet Technologies Pte. Ltd. ("Comet"). Comet is identified by UEN T23FC1234A and led by Mr. Jonathan Orion. The total consideration for the acquisition is SGD 45,000,000, as outlined in the Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). Further details of the SPA can be accessed at https://example.sg/doc/S2345678I.

Please contact Dr. Celia Star at +65 6123 4567 or c.star@nebula.synthesis.sg for any inquiries. Note that the project plan does not include the latest project status updates.

Comet's key executive contacts have been collected, including Ms. Stella Galaxy, reachable at s.galaxy@comet.sg. Her NRIC is S8765432Z, and her office can be contacted at +65 6789 4321.

We look forward to your feedback on Project Nebula.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
Acquisitions Team Lead
